channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Global Climate Report Highlights Urgency for Decarbonisation and Climate Action
item.description: The 2025 State of the Climate report, published by the World Meteorological Organization, paints a worrying picture of our planet’s warming state. Carbon dioxide levels are at their highest in recorde...

item.title: Five bodies retrieved from Ekapa mine following tragic mud rush incident
item.description: The bodies of five mineworkers who were trapped underground at the Ekapa Minerals mine in Kimberley have now been retrieved. The tragic incident occurred on February 17 when a mud rush trapped the wor...

item.title: Gospel Singer Karangu Muraya Attends Bishop Muthee Kiengei's JCM Church Service Amid Past Rumours of Tension
item.description: Gospel musician Karangu Muraya and Bishop Muthee Kiengei, the leader of Jesus Compassion Ministries (JCM), seem to have buried the hatchet after a public appearance together at the church on Sunday, M...

item.title: Marco Bezzecchi secures fourth consecutive MotoGP triumph in Brazil
item.description: Aprilia’s Marco Bezzecchi claimed his fourth straight MotoGP victory at the Brazilian Grand Prix in Goiania, extending his championship lead to 11 points over KTM’s Pedro Acosta. Starting from second ...

item.title: Major Events Across Africa on 23 March 2026
item.description: On 23 March 2026, a series of major stories shaped headlines across the continent. In Sudan, at least 64 people — including 13 children, health workers, and patients — lost their lives after a drone s...

item.title: Tanzania and South Africa Strengthen Cooperation in Volunteering, Disaster Response, and Humanitarian Law
item.description: In a significant move to deepen cooperation, Tanzania and South Africa have agreed to promote volunteer activities, disaster management, and humanitarian law. This was the key outcome of a visit by Ta...

item.title: iPhone 17e: Features and performance of Apple’s budget-friendly smartphone
item.description: Apple has released the iPhone 17e, an upgraded version of its mid-range “e” line, starting at £599. It retains the iPhone 14-style design with a 6.1-inch OLED screen and a large notch but introduces k...

item.title: Peshawar Bank Robbery: Millions in Cash and Gold Stolen Ahead of Eid
item.description: A shocking incident unfolded in Peshawar on the eve of Eidul Fitr, as robbers successfully breached a National Bank branch and made off with a significant amount of cash and gold. According to police ...

item.title: Conservatives focus on affordability as Liberals hold strong lead in national polls
item.description: Steve Outhouse, the Conservative Party of Canada's campaign manager, has dismissed recent national polls indicating that the governing Liberals under Prime Minister Mark Carney are maintaining a comfo...

item.title: Manipur: Protestors Attempt to Storm Kuki Zo Council Chairman's House, Fire Used to Disperse Crowd
item.description: In a troubling incident on Sunday night, a mob attempted to forcibly enter the residence of H Thanglet, the chairman of the Kuki Zo Council, in Churachandpur, a town in Manipur. The youths were protes...

item.title: Tanzania inafuatilia mpango wa nguvi wa 33.23 trilion dola katika uhusiano wake wa uwekezaji wa nguvi kwa Marekani
item.description: Tanzania imefahamisha kwa umma kwa makazi ya kigeni, hususan Marekani, kwamba kuna mpango wa nguvi wa ajabu wa takriban 33.23 trilion dola kwa kipindi cha miaka kadhaa. Mpango huu una mlengwa kuongeza...

item.title: Affordable Coastal Towns in the UK for Buying a Beachfront Home
item.description: As coastal property prices soar in the UK, prospective buyers seeking their own seaside retreat are increasingly looking to lesser-known locations that offer value without compromising on charm. Exper...

item.title: Dangote Refinery Boosts Nigeria's Energy Export With 456,000 Tonnes of Fuel to Africa
item.description: Dangote Refinery don sell 456,000 tonnes (456KT) of refined fuel to different African countries like Cote d'Ivoire, Cameroon, Ghana, Tanzania, and Togo. This move come after the refinery hit a product...

item.title: How the Trump administration uses memes, AI and pop culture to portray the Iran conflict as a detached spectacle
item.description: Nesrine Malik argues that the US-led war on Iran under President Trump is being presented not as a serious geopolitical conflict with profound human, economic and regional consequences, but as an ente...

item.title: High Court to Deliver Verdict in Sharon Otieno Murder Case Involving Former Migori Governor
item.description: On the morning of September 5, 2018, Sharon Belyne Otieno, a 26-year-old student at Rongo University, was found brutally murdered in a thicket at Owade village, Homa Bay County. She was 28 weeks pregn...

item.title: Bihar Board Class 12 Examination Results to Be Declared Today
item.description: The Bihar Board Class 12 results are scheduled to be declared today at 1:30 PM. Students who appeared for the exams can check their results online once it is published. NDTV had previously provided a ...

item.title: Ibram X Kendi discusses great replacement theory and the threat of authoritarianism in new book interview
item.description: In an interview with The Guardian, American historian and antiracism scholar Ibram X Kendi discusses his latest book, Chain of Ideas, which examines the rise and global spread of the 'great replacemen...

item.title: EU President Ursula von der Leyen's Visit to Australia, Fuel Debate in Parliament, and Other Key Updates
item.description: The latest political updates in Australia revolve around a series of significant events. European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen has arrived in Sydney, marking the beginning of her official...

item.title: Pakistan reaffirms its commitment to national security on Pakistan Day
item.description: On Pakistan Day, President Asif Ali Zardari and Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif honoured the martyrs and national heroes who contributed to the creation and stability of Pakistan. They highlighted the c...

item.title: Independent Commission for Infrastructure submits flood control investigation documents to DOJ
item.description: The Independent Commission for Infrastructure (ICI) officially handed over documents detailing its investigation into alleged irregularities in flood control projects to the Department of Justice (DOJ...
